title: Meo Listening Part 1

title: Meo Listening Part 2
summary: Chon dap an theo nguoi noi
content: Doc ky nhan vat Person 1-4, nghe keyword va loai dap an thua. Co the them tai lieu PDF local bang /documents/listening-part2.pdf.

title: Meo Reading Part 1
content: Nhin loai tu truoc va sau cho trong, sau do chon dap an hop ngu phap va nghia.

title: Meo Reading Part 5
summary: Noi tieu de voi doan van
content: Doc cau dau, cau cuoi va keyword rieng cua tung doan. Co the chen file: /documents/reading-part5.pdf.

title: Meo Speaking Part 2
content: Noi theo thu tu: tong quan, nguoi/vat, hanh dong, cam nhan. Moi cau noi toi da 45 giay.

title: Meo Writing Email
content: Tai lieu local vi du: /documents/aptis-writing-tips.pdf. Dat file PDF trong frontend/public/documents.

title: Meo Grammar
summary: Cac diem ngu phap hay gap
content: On thi, cau dieu kien, gioi tu, collocation va tu vung theo chu de.
